LAW AND MOTION 302, MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THE COURT VACATES THE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. DEFENDANT DEMONSTRATES THAT HE WAS NOT PROPERLY SUBSTITUTE SERVED. SEE CCP 415.20(B); CCP 473(D). IN ADDITION, EVEN IF SERVICE WERE PROPER, DEFENDANT DEMONSTRATES THAT HE LACKED ACTUAL NOTICE OF THE SUIT IN TIME TO DEFEND. SEE CCP 473.5. DEFENDANT TO FILE AND SERVE HIS ANSWER BY MAY 7, 2015. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: ANN DELGADO, CSR # 11185; DEPT. 302. =302/HK

Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar May-05-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. RACHEL LOH, TEL. NO. 931-4207 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT GARRETT BAUMGARTNER's Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment is granted. The Court vacates the default and default judgment. Defendant demonstrates that he was not properly substitute served. See CCP 415.20(b); CCP 473(d). In addition, even if service were proper, defendant demonstrates that he lacked actual notice of the suit in time to defend. See CCP 473.5. Defendant to file and serve his answer by May 7, 2015. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR # 11185 =302/hk
